sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50966" key="*)isqmiasth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Ἰσθμ-ιαστής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n50966.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">spectator of the Isthmian games</tr_>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Ἰσθμιασταί, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">οἱ</gen></foreign>, title of a play by Aeschylus.</sense> </entryFree>
